title: From Loop to RSI
thesis: A restartable loop becomes RSI only when recursive improvement is governed by deterministic state, baseline comparisons, evidence contact, replay, stress tests, dossier packaging, and human authority.

loopToRsiMap.loopRule: write the loop, not the prompt

loopToRsiMap.rsiControl: RSIState with append-only archives and state hashes
ECI ledger, proof bundles, dossier evidence
remove scaffolds that no longer improve verified work
operational dashboard exposes replay, evidence, exploration, advantage, safety, and state integrity bottlenecks

move37.trigger: noveltyDistance >= 0.80 and advantageDelta threshold with risk/evidence gates

claimBoundary: This page is a browser-local control-plane demonstration. It does not claim achieved RSI, AGI, ASI, SOTA, external audit completion, autonomous sovereignty, production certification, or production authority.
